source_pr.title: plan: build separate required physical property for children
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/8634 ### What is changed and how it works? RCA is provided here https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/8634#issuecomment-445703564 For logical operator which passes the required physical property down to its children, make a copy for it instead of direct assignment using the original pointer. ### Check List Tests - Unit test Code changes - Has exported function/method change Side effects N/A Related changes - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8635)

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(a, b) */ a.c1 from t a , (select * from t1 limit 3) b where a.c1 = b.c1 and b.c1 is not null order by b.c1;") (executor/merge_join_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(a, b) */ a.c1 from t a , (select * from t1 limit 3) b where a.c1 = b.c1 and b.c1 is not null order by b.c1;") (executor/merge_join_test.go)
